title: Assembly constituency dimension row (canonical, period-stable)
description: Logical contract for one row of datasets/elections/dim_acs.parquet. One row per (state_code, delim_year, eci_no). Holds the AC display name and identity fields that observations.parquet does not carry. PK = ac_id (canonical/adapters/eci/identity.ac_entity_id). Period-stable within a delimitation cycle; UPSERT-idempotent across re-runs. Sub-phase 1.2b of TODO/20260517-canonical-long-format-pivot.md.

x-changelog.description: Initial dim_acs schema. Columns: ac_id PK, state_code, delim_year, eci_no, name, source_id.

ac_id.description: PK. e.g. 'IN-S22-AC-2008-167' (Mylapore in the 2008 delimitation cycle).

state_code.description: ECI state code (e.g. S22 for Tamil Nadu, U05 for Delhi).

eci_no.description: ECI numeric AC number within the state.

name.description: Display name as printed by ECI (e.g. 'Mylapore'). Nullable when upstream omitted it. The citizen URL slug is derived; this is the canonical label.

source_id.description: FK -> taxonomy/sources.parquet. First-observed source; UPSERT keeps the earliest observation.
